name: Devil's Food Cake with Fudge Frosting (u. S.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two 8-inch layer cake pans well, then dust them generously with cocoa powder.
3. Sift together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt on a piece of waxed paper; set aside.
4. Cream butter until fluffy; gradually add sugar and vanilla, beating to a light color.
5. Add eggs one at a time, alternating with sifted dry ingredients, beginning and ending with dry ingredients, and beat well after each addition.
6. Divide batter evenly between pans; smooth tops.
7. Bake 30-35 minutes or until layers feel spongy and pull away from sides of pans.
8. Cool layers upright on wire racks 10 minutes, then loosen edges with a spatula and turn onto racks; cool completely.
9. For frosting: Cream butter until light; gradually add confectioners' sugar, beating constantly. Beat in melted chocolate and vanilla; add enough cream to reach desired spreading consistency.
10. Assemble cake by sandwiching layers together with frosting; frost top and sides. Swirl frosting into peaks and valleys. Makes about 8 servings.
